shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'pwd && rg -n "in-selecting-range|selecting-range|selectsRange|isInSelectingRange" src tests || true && rg --files | head -80'

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function newDate|const newDate|export.*newDate|month:\" src/test/day_test.test.tsx | head -30 && sed -n '450,530p' src/month.tsx && sed -n '1000,1070p' src/calendar.tsx && rg -n \"renderDay\\(\" src/test/day_test.test.tsx | tail -20"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1140,1205p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx; rg -n \"jest\\.useFakeTimers|setSystemTime|newDate\" src/test/index.ts src/test/setup* src/date_utils.ts | head -50; git diff -- package.json"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '90,125p' src/date_utils.ts; rg -n \"Date\\.now|setSystemTime|fakeTimers|201[0-9]-|202[0-9]-\" src/test/index.ts src/test/*.test.tsx | head -40; sed -n '250,390p' src/day.tsx"
